case_title: BENITA FINLEY PURIFOY VS. PUBLIC STORAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,409.42 FILED BY PURIFOY, BENITA FINLEY AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PURIFOY, BENITA FINLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
